SCHEDULE:

 ~ Partridgeberry: All year
 ~ Checkerberry: All year 
 ~ Spruce Tips: April-May
 ~ Black highbush blueberries: Late June
 ~ Highbush blueberries: July-August - these will ripen uphill first and downhill later 
 ~ Cherries: August-Fall 
 ~ Grapes: S
